en: No one's ever going to take me seriously. People at law school don't. Warner doesn't.
ko: 아무도 나를 진지하게 생각하지 않을 거야.
ja: 誰も私を真剣に見てくれない。
vi: Se khong ai coi toi la nghiem tuc ca.

en: I don't even think my own parents take me seriously.
ko: 내 부모님조차 나를 진지하게 생각하지 않는 것 같아.
ja: 両親でさえ私を真剣に見てないと思う。
zhTW: 我覺得連我爸媽都不把我當回事。
vi: Toi nghi ngay ca bo me toi cung khong coi trong toi.

en: It just felt like, for the first time, that someone expected me to...
ko: 처음으로 누군가가 나에게 기대하고 있다는 걸 느꼈어...
ja: 初めて誰かが私に期待してくれてると感じたの…
zhTW: 我只是覺得，第一次有人期待我...
vi: Toi chi cam thay, lan dau tien, co nguoi ky vong toi...

en: to do something more with my life than just become a Victoria's Secret model.
ko: 빅토리아 시크릿 모델이 되는 것 이상의 삶을 살기를.
ja: ヴィクトリアシークレットのモデルになる以上のことを人生でやるべきだって。
zhTW: 做一些比當維多利亞的秘密模特兒更有意義的事。
vi: lam dieu gi do hon la chi tro thanh nguoi mau Victoria's Secret.

en: Then I was just kidding myself. Callahan never saw me as a lawyer. He just saw me as a piece of ass.
ja: ただのセクシーな対象として見てただけ。
zhTW: 他只把我當成性感花瓶。
vi: Ong ta chi coi toi la mon do choi.

en: Just like everybody else. Turns out I am a joke.
ja: 結局、私はジョークだったんだ。
zhTW: 結果我真的只是個笑話。
vi: Hoa ra toi chi la tro cuoi.

ja: 違うよ、あなたはジョークなんかじゃない。
vi: Khong, ban khong phai la tro cuoi.

en: The hell with law school. I just wanted to say goodbye.
ja: さよならを言いたかっただけ。
vi: Toi chi muon noi loi tam biet thoi.

en: If you're going to let one stupid prick ruin your life...
